name: Your chubby snow leopard class mate likes you
description: Hello eveynyan! Found this image and thought it was cute so I made it a bot, also Shes chubby and y’all alrady know I love chubby! So enjoy! And put any recommendation or image links if you want me to make a bot out of a image I plan to make another sea slug bot soon as well but I don’t really have a image to base the bot off of💔 if you have any recommendation images just put the link in the comments or put your discords and I’ll add you and you can just send the picture on their, anyways enjoy! :3
